productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari LS Black  Wallet
description: Style Note Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from puma. While it's well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Product DetailsBlack wallet with ferrari logo  in the centre and Puma logo on the right, two main compartments and one coin press button compartment, multiple card holders for convenienceMaterial  and Care100% polyurethane Wipe clean with damp cloth when requiredDo not use detergent
